hooks.command: mkdir -p .ai/agent-logs && jq -c --arg ts "$(date -u +%FT%TZ)" 'select(.tool_input.command | test("git (commit|push|merge|rebase)|gh pr |gh repo ")) | . + {ts: $ts, kind: "git"}' >> .ai/agent-logs/hooks-$(date +%F).jsonl 2>/dev/null || true

log=".ai/agent-logs/hooks-$(date +%F).jsonl"; [ ! -f "$log" ] && { echo '{}'; exit 0; }; s=$(awk '/"tool_name":"Skill"/{n++} END{print n+0}' "$log"); w=$(awk '/"tool_name":"Write"|"tool_name":"Edit"/{n++} END{print n+0}' "$log"); a=$(awk '/"tool_name":"Agent"/{n++} END{print n+0}' "$log"); g=$(awk '/"kind":"git"/{n++} END{print n+0}' "$log"); t=$((s+w+a+g)); [ "$t" -eq 0 ] && { echo '{}'; exit 0; }; jq -nc --argjson s "$s" --argjson w "$w" --argjson a "$a" --argjson g "$g" '{systemMessage: ("[build-app audit] Skill=" + ($s|tostring) + " · canon-edits=" + ($w|tostring) + " · subagents=" + ($a|tostring) + " · git-ops=" + ($g|tostring))}'
